queries.query: Habitat oxygen and pressure are dropping after a suspected module leak. Retrieve the immediate isolation and oxygen-conservation procedure.
Solar array output has collapsed after external damage. Retrieve the approved solar-array failure and repair procedure.
Available electrical power is insufficient for normal habitat loads. Retrieve the approved power-rationing and load-reduction procedure.
An external repair requires an EVA. Retrieve the approved EVA repair preparation, execution, and safety procedure.
A damaged solar array has reduced available power and may require an EVA repair. Retrieve the procedures needed for solar failure, power rationing, and EVA repair.
